positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune), drawn in a strong, elegant silhouette against a deep indigo cosmic void. The fox should have glowing, ethereal tails and pointed ears, surrounded by abstract star clusters and crescent moons. Focus on negative space and sharp lines. Vibrant cyan and gold accents should highlight the spirit's form and the cosmic elements. Central composition, vector art style, graphic novel aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, clean lines, symmetrical balance, dramatic lighting.
negative: blur, low detail, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, realistic, photorealistic, complex background, grain
